sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68642" key="monosa/ndalos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μονο-σάνδᾰλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n68642.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with but one sandal</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0548.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:9:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.9.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
